SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT ARAIZA, JACKLYN TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT DIAZ, ELYSSA ELYSSA DIAZ DID NOT PAY ANY MONIES IN RENT OR OTHER PAYMENTS TO JACKLYN ARAIZA AND HER SUBSTITUTE RENT IS NOT COMPENSABLE AS DAMAGES. CROSS CLAIM JUDGMENT IS ORDER IN FAVOR OF ELYSSA DIAZ AND AGAINST JACKLYN ARAIZA IN THE AMOUNT OF $0.00. JACKLYN ARAIZA DID NOT PERSONALLY INCUR DAMAGES AS A RESULT OF THE ALLEGED ACTION. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-09-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:10am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Jacklyn Araiza appears with counsel Roberto Jimenez as well as Yvonne Araiza. Respondent, Elyssa Diaz appears in pro per with Vicky Diaz.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and answer questions from Judge Myles.
Appellant calls witness Karin Kimiecik who is sworn in.

EXHR (A) 1 page witness letter
EXHR (B) envelope with receipts for expenses
EXHA (1) multi-page document starting with a declaration
EXHA (2) 3 page document of emails and spread sheet from Park Merced

10:16am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-11-2010 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-11-2010 Judgment Entered
